scale_note: Each sub-KPI is min-max normalized to [0,1] where 1 is the best operational outcome (lower-is-better KPIs are inverted). The final target is a convex combination using the weights below and is itself in [0,1].

t_resolve_min.description: Time the remediation action takes to resolve the unexpected situation or restart production.

unplanned_downtime_remaining_shift_min.description: Unexpected downtime the equipment will experience over the remaining minutes of the 8h shift.

waste_kg_remaining_shift.description: Waste generated as a result of the remediation action over the remaining shift.

temp_deviation_c_avg.description: Average absolute temperature deviation (Fryer / Thermal Oil / Seasoning) from setpoint after remediation.

vibration_mm_s_avg.description: Average vibration RMS (Bag Maker / Weigher / Palletizer / Conveyor) after remediation.

production_goal_pct_remaining.description: Percentage of production goal achieved during the remaining shift after remediation.

true_efficiency_pct_remaining.description: True Efficiency (Availability x Performance x Quality, schedule-adjusted) during the remaining shift.

consumer_complaints_expected.description: Expected consumer complaints attributable to product produced during the remaining shift.

quality_ok_pct_remaining.description: Percentage of production quality tests returning OK during the remaining shift.

operator_satisfaction_1_5.description: Operator satisfaction score (1=low, 5=high) for the crew performing the remediation.

on_hold_inventory_kg_generated.description: On-hold inventory (kg) generated by the remediation action awaiting QA disposition.
